comment.body:
Hi guys, I am a bit confused after watching an OD new youtube video about greeks, https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NrpdRNWEIHg. 
The statements about vanna appear to contradict one another. At 8:55, it says vanna is negative above the strike and positive below the strike for long options; However, at 10:40, it says vanna is positive above strike and negative below strike in long position. 
Hope anyone could shed a light. Thanks.

comment.body:
Script 1st: Mean Reversion Threshold Levels
Every morning, you will receive an input phrase via email. Simply copy and paste it into the input window that appears when you run the script. The levels will be automatically plotted on the chart.
